query: Embedded my dashboard with <luzmo-embed-dashboard> and it just doesn't render — no error, no element on the page. Token comes back fine from the backend. What now?
Our Flex bar chart shows up as a 0px-tall div even though the container has height. Tried setting height='400px' on the component but still invisible.
Three charts on the same page, two of them are swapping data with each other randomly on page reload. Something feels off but I can't tell what.
Getting 'Action "search" not found' from the Luzmo API when I try to list dashboards. The SDK call looks correct.
Help, our customer just emailed saying they can see another customer's revenue in our embedded dashboard. This is bad.
401 Unauthorized when calling createAuthorization from our Node backend — env vars look set, region is EU. What should I check first?
Flex chart throws 'Invalid title' on init. options.title is set to 'Quarterly revenue'.
Dark theme is applied via the embed token but the area around the chart is still bright white. Looks awful.
ACK is showing the slot drop panel but no chart ever appears no matter what fields I drop. Designer token, ACK addon is enabled.
IQ Chat in our React app returns completely unrelated answers — asks for 'top 5 customers by revenue' and gets back a list of products.
Setting up a brand-new Luzmo integration from scratch. Where do I start with auth and the SDK?
How do I push a 25k-row CSV into a new dataset using @luzmo/nodejs-sdk?
Building a multi-tenant SaaS — each tenant gets their own filtered view. What pattern should I use, dataset-level or token-level filters?
Creating a custom theme JSON that matches our brand palette and Inter font. What's the schema?
How do I let end-users edit dashboards in a white-label studio? Looking at ACK.
Python script to associate a dashboard with a dataset programmatically.
Need to model a derived column that calculates 'profit margin' as a percentage. How does that work in Luzmo's data model?
What's the difference between Pattern 1 (EmbedFilterGroup) and Pattern 2 (token filters) for tenant isolation in terms of security guarantees?
Integrating Luzmo IQ as a tool for our internal Claude agent. How do I register the tool definition?
What's the latest version of @luzmo/react-embed and what does it require Peer-Dep-wise?
